/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/curl/lib: CMakeFiles/ast_distance.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ast_distance.dir/src/ast_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ast_distance.dir/src/ast_normalizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ast_distance.dir/src/similarity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ast_distance.dir/src/symbol_extractor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ast_distance.dir/src/symbol_analysis.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ast_distance.dir/src/symbol_extraction.cpp.o -o ast_distance  libtree-sitter-core.a libtree-sitter-rust-parser.a libtree-sitter-kotlin-parser.a libtree-sitter-cpp-parser.a libtree-sitter-python-parser.a libtree-sitter-typescript-parser.a
